response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional Staff-level experience from top-tier companies, featuring direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and high-throughput distributed systems. Although he lacks the mandatory Python experience, his deep expertise in TypeScript, architectural patterns, and agentic workflows makes him a highly compelling candidate for this AI-driven engineering role.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record with high-throughput, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong software craftsmanship mindset with extensive Staff-level tenure at leading tech companies.
concerns: Does not possess the must-have strong Python programming skills.
Resume contains unusual entries (e.g., 'Founder, Amazon' and future start dates) that require clarification.
Past high-throughput architecture experience heavily utilized DLang rather than mainstream enterprise languages.
